name: do-it
description: Autonomy-first AI coding workflow for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode with task-fit skills, optional subagents, and evidence-backed completion.

interface.longDescription: Install do-it via the Codex plugin marketplace. Skills and bundled agents are selected only when task-fit helps; plugin hooks provide compact routing and evidence reminders. Trust plugin hooks in /hooks after install.
defaultPrompt: Work autonomously: choose do-it skills or bundled agents only when task-fit helps; honor direct user intent, keep external/destructive actions confirmed, and report task-relevant evidence.
